lever_summary: Dense F64/I64 contiguous gather. The contiguous gather path (trailing slice == operand dims) copied Vec<Literal> slices (materializing a dense operand to 24-byte enums on first access) into a Vec<Literal> output. New dense path copies contiguous typed slices straight from as_f64_slice()/as_i64_slice() into a dense typed output (8 vs 24 bytes/elem, no materialization).

alien_graveyard.primitive: dense SoA / typed columnar storage applied to gather
alien_graveyard.mapping: copy contiguous native-typed slices (extend_from_slice / memcpy) instead of materializing + copying 24-byte tagged-union elements

method: Same-worker comparison on ts2: dense (new_f64_values) operand vs a Vec<Literal>-backed operand run in the same process; shared i64 indices and slice_sizes.
command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- gather_256x256_f64 --save-baseline gath

change.lever: In eval_gather's trailing_slice_is_contiguous branch, a dense_contiguous_gather macro handles F64 (as_f64_slice, fill NaN, new_f64_values) and I64 (as_i64_slice, fill i64::MIN, new_i64_values) before the unchanged Vec<Literal> copy loop; falls through for non-dense / other dtypes.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: same resolved index order, same contiguous slice ranges [idx*slice_elems .. +slice_elems]
isomorphism.fill: unchanged: out-of-bounds (FILL_OR_DROP None) slices emit the per-dtype fill — F64 NaN (== gather_fill_literal(F64) = F64Bits(NaN.to_bits())), I64 i64::MIN (== gather_fill_literal(I64)) — repeated slice_elems times
isomorphism.errors: unchanged: same checked_mul/checked_add overflow checks and the same 'slice exceeds operand element count' bound (src.len() == operand.elements.len())
isomorphism.index_modes: clip and fill_or_drop both validated; resolved indices computed by the shared resolve_axis0_index before the dense branch

validation.name: dense_gather_parity
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib --release gather
validation.result: passed incl dense_gather_contiguous_matches_literal_path ([32,40] full-row gather, OOB indices, clip + fill_or_drop, f64 by bits + i64)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed (release dodges shared-target proc-macro rmeta drift in debug)
